/home/dev/cleanup.sh.content:
#!/bin/bash
trap 'echo cleaning up; exit' SIGTERM SIGINT

echo "Running..."
while true; do
  sleep 1
done

/home/dev/signal-table.txt.content:
1  SIGHUP   Reload config
2  SIGINT   Ctrl+C interrupt
9  SIGKILL  Force kill (cannot trap)
15 SIGTERM  Default kill signal
18 SIGCONT  Resume stopped process
19 SIGSTOP  Pause process (cannot trap)
